title: prunus vaniotii var. obovata
intro: Prunus vaniotii var. obovata, also known as Chinese plum, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Prunus vaniotii var. obovata include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to make medicinal tonics, ointments, and salves.
